title: ALFWorld Text
description: Evaluate a multi-turn text agent against the official ALFWorld TextWorld environment on the mirrored valid_seen split.
baseline_summary: A placeholder ALFWorld adapter that tracks state but never emits an action.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. Preserve def step(turn, runtime) and optionally def init_episode(episode). Each run evaluates exactly one ALFWorld episode. Read turn.observation, turn.history, and turn.state, then emit an `act(command)` tool call when you know the next ALFWorld-style text action. Use `complete(message)` only when you intend to stop the episode.

tools.name: act
tools.description: Submit one ALFWorld text action such as `take apple`, `open fridge`, or `put apple in fridge`.

command.description: One text action to execute in the environment.

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Declare the episode solved or intentionally stop.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher successful-episode rate is better across ALFWorld multi-turn episodes.
